title: Swan SK19011N Dual Voltage Travel Kettle with Two Tea Cups, 0.5 Litre Capacity, 125-600 W, Lightweight, White/Grey
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 0.5 LITRE CAPACITY AND FAST BOIL TECHNOLOGY: Provides enough for at least two speedy brews; even comes with two travel cups which can be conveniently stacked up and stored inside the kettle when travelling, to save space; this set really does come with everything you need to make a lovely hot drink no matter where you are

OVERHEATING PROTECTION AND BOIL DRY TECHNOLOGY: Which means the kettle will automatically switch off when it is fully boiled or empty; the integrated spout allows for easy, fuss-free pouring with no drips or spills; the cool-touch easy grip handle is sturdy and allows for good control

ERGONOMIC HINGED LID: Locks in place to ensure your safety and prevents the lid shooting open when travelling, transporting or when in use; easy reach power switch and illuminating power on indicator shows you when it’s switched on and boiling; incredibly simple and easy to use
NOTE: This product is not suitable for 12V car sockets
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Comes with a 2-year manufacturer guarantee, protecting you from any issues you find
description: From the manufacturer With a strong British heritage dating back to the 1920s, Swan understands that the kitchen is the heart of home life. It’s where delicious meals are made and memories are created. Iconic Cookware and Appliances Affordable Dream Kitchens 100 Years of British Heritage Stylish Design and Outstanding Performance A sleek and compact design, perfect for those always on the move With a 0.5 litre capacity, it's just right for two servings of your favourite hot beverage. Dual voltage compatibility means you can use it anywhere in the world. Safety is a priority with its built-in overheating protection. Operating between 125W and 600W and equipped with a 5amp fuse, it's designed for efficiency and peace of mind. Ideal for travellers who value convenience without compromising on safety. 0.5L Capacity Auto switch off Dual voltage Comes with 2 tea cups TWO TEA CUPS Provides enough for at least two speedy brews and comes with two travel cups which can be conveniently stacked up and stored inside the kettle when travelling, to save space 0.5L CAPACITY Offers a sleek and compact design, perfect for those always on the move. It's just right for two servings of your favourite hot beverage AUTO SWITCH OFF The kettle automatically switches off after boiling, providing an extra safety measure for busy families with children or animals
